pass_summaries.summary: Revised the chapter toward route-based plural strategy planning, restored Silas close-third pressure early in the supper scene, and changed the ending from a successful public proof into an uncertain first read with explicit misread and weather risks.
Chapter 12 now keeps the supper-table and comic-resourceful momentum while reducing the negation tic and dramatizing plurality through scene action, route planning, and public correction.
